title: Monday MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Monday MCP Server for Claude

Manage monday.com boards, items, and CRM activities

- **Category:** mcp
- **Author:** Monday.com
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `monday` `project-management` `crm` `workflow` `team-management`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status monday
```

## Config
```json
{
  "monday": {
    "url": "https://mcp.monday.com/sse",
    "transport": "sse"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status monday

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/monday-mcp-server
- https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/mondaycom-mcp-integration
